'''âk-t-j''' ('''kakataj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imperate|imperate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-t-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imperate|imperate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-t-j
|-
! Lemma
| kakataj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikataj|thikataj]] || [[word:jikataj|jikataj]] || [[word:shikataj|shikataj]] || [[word:kikataj|kikataj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukataj|thuthukataj]] || [[word:jujukataj|jujukataj]] || [[word:shushukataj|shushukataj]] || [[word:kukukataj|kukukataj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukataj|thukataj]] || [[word:jukataj|jukataj]] || [[word:shukataj|shukataj]] || [[word:kukataj|kukataj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukataj|thukataj]] || [[word:jukataj|jukataj]] || [[word:shukataj|shukataj]] || [[word:kukataj|kukataj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekataj|thekataj]] || [[word:jekataj|jekataj]] || [[word:shekataj|shekataj]] || [[word:kekataj|kekataj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokataj|thothokataj]] || [[word:jojokataj|jojokataj]] || [[word:shoshokataj|shoshokataj]] || [[word:kokokataj|kokokataj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokataj|thokataj]] || [[word:jokataj|jokataj]] || [[word:shokataj|shokataj]] || [[word:kokataj|kokataj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokataj|thokataj]] || [[word:jokataj|jokataj]] || [[word:shokataj|shokataj]] || [[word:kokataj|kokataj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkataj|thĂŠkataj]] || [[word:jĂŠkataj|jĂŠkataj]] || [[word:shĂŠkataj|shĂŠkataj]] || [[word:kĂŠkataj|kĂŠkataj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakataj|thathakataj]] || [[word:jajakataj|jajakataj]] || [[word:shashakataj|shashakataj]] || [[word:kakakataj|kakakataj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakataj|thakataj]] || [[word:jakataj|jakataj]] || [[word:shakataj|shakataj]] || [[word:kakataj|kakataj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakataj|thakataj]] || [[word:jakataj|jakataj]] || [[word:shakataj|shakataj]] || [[word:kakataj|kakataj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakataj|shakataj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakataj|goshakataj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakataj|gokishakataj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakatajnĂŒ|shakatajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakatajnknĂŒ|goshakatajnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakatajnĂŒ|gokishakatajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakatajshĂ«|shakatajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakatajnkshĂ«|goshakatajnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakatajshĂ«|gokishakatajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakatajro|shakatajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakatajnkro|goshakatajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakatajro|gokishakatajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakatajmu|shakatajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakatajnkmu|goshakatajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakatajmu|gokishakatajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakatajsher|shakatajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakatajnksher|goshakatajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakatajsher|gokishakatajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakatajng|shakatajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakatajnkng|goshakatajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakatajng|gokishakatajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakatajya|shakatajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakatajnkya|goshakatajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakatajya|gokishakatajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakatajyam|shakatajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakatajnkyam|goshakatajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakatajyam|gokishakatajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakatajnĂŒshĂ«|shakatajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakatajnknĂŒshĂ«|goshakatajnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakatajnĂŒshĂ«|gokishakatajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakatajnĂŒro|shakatajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakatajnknĂŒro|goshakatajnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakatajnĂŒro|gokishakatajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakatajnĂŒmu|shakatajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakatajnknĂŒmu|goshakatajnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakatajnĂŒmu|gokishakatajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakatajshĂ«nĂŒ|shakatajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakatajnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakatajnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakatajshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakatajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakatajshĂ«ro|shakatajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakatajnkshĂ«ro|goshakatajnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakatajshĂ«ro|gokishakatajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakatajshĂ«mu|shakatajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakatajnkshĂ«mu|goshakatajnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakatajshĂ«mu|gokishakatajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakatajronĂŒ|shakatajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakatajnkronĂŒ|goshakatajnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakatajronĂŒ|gokishakatajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakatajroshĂ«|shakatajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakatajnkroshĂ«|goshakatajnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakatajroshĂ«|gokishakatajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakatajromu|shakatajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakatajnkromu|goshakatajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakatajromu|gokishakatajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakatajmunĂŒ|shakatajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakatajnkmunĂŒ|goshakatajnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakatajmunĂŒ|gokishakatajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakatajmushĂ«|shakatajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakatajnkmushĂ«|goshakatajnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakatajmushĂ«|gokishakatajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakatajmuro|shakatajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakatajnkmuro|goshakatajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakatajmuro|gokishakatajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
